evals.prompt: A reviewer left a GitHub PR review comment asking for a null-check. Reply in-thread after confirming the fix and avoid posting a general PR comment.
evals.expected_output: An action plan or command sequence that finds the review comment ID and posts an in-thread reply instead of a general PR comment.
assertions: The response prefers an in-thread review reply over a general PR comment
The response uses GitHub CLI or gh api rather than generic prose only
The response distinguishes review comments from issue comments or loose PR comments

evals.prompt: Investigate a failed GitHub Actions run and tell me the first actionable failure before proposing YAML changes.
evals.expected_output: A triage flow that inspects runs/logs first and extracts the earliest actionable failing step before suggesting workflow edits.
assertions: The response inspects workflow runs/logs before recommending workflow edits
The response prioritizes the first actionable failure rather than downstream noise
The response uses gh run commands or equivalent GitHub evidence collection

evals.prompt: Create a GitHub PR for the current branch, but only if one does not already exist, and use the project template.
evals.expected_output: A command flow that checks for an existing PR first, then uses an explicit PR body template when creating one.
assertions: The response checks for an existing PR for the same head branch before creating one
The response prefers a repo-local template or explicit body-file injection
The response avoids creating duplicate PRs
